summary: Testing of 3 new features completed successfully: 1) Reports page with breeding statistics, 2) Family Tree/Genealogy page with ancestry visualization, 3) Export functionality (CSV/PDF). All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested

seed_data_creation: Created test bird family (grandparent -> parent -> child -> sibling) for genealogy testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features fully tested and working: 1) Reports API (GET /api/reports/breeding-stats) returns comprehensive stats, 2) Genealogy API (GET /api/birds/{id}/genealogy) returns parents, grandparents, children, siblings, 3) Export APIs work correctly for birds CSV/PDF and breeding report CSV/PDF. Navigation updated with Family Tree and Reports links. Birds form has parent selection dropdowns.

ui_elements: Ancestry visualization with grandparents, parents, selected bird levels

observations.reports_ui: Shows comprehensive breeding statistics including Total Eggs, Hatched Chicks, Fertility Rate, Hatch Rate, Egg Status Breakdown (Fertile/Hatched/Infertile/Dead bars), Performance Metrics with rates, Clutch Summary (Total/Completed/Active), and Export Data section with CSV/PDF buttons for both birds and breeding report.
observations.genealogy_ui: Shows bird selector dropdown, empty state message when no bird selected, and after selection shows Ancestry tree with Grandparents (4 slots), Parents (2 slots), and Selected Bird with connecting lines. Shows 'Unknown' for missing ancestors.
observations.birds_form_parent_selection: Form now includes 'PARENTS (FOR FAMILY TREE)' section with Father (Male) and Mother (Female) dropdowns that list existing birds of appropriate gender.
